title: erigeron heliographis
intro: Erigeron heliographis, also known as Daisy Fleabane, is a perennial herb plant native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Erigeron heliographis include its potential to reduce inflammation, relieve digestive issues, and support the immune system. Erigeron heliographis can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
